prose: **Fukui Reactivity of Acrolein** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP), PySCF, gas phase, charge 0 (neutral), multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied acrolein.xyz (8 atoms). Fukui indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰) computed via Mulliken charge partitioning from converged SCF calculations of the neutral molecule and its cation/anion (N±1) states. **Most electrophilic atom:** terminal carbon (atom 4, f⁺ = 0.6423). **Most nucleophilic atom:** oxygen (atom 1, f⁻ = 0.3939). Dual descriptor shows atom 4 is strongly electrophilic (ΔDD = 0.5549), while hydrogens are nucleophilic. Charge conservation verified (∑f⁺ = ∑f⁻ = 1.0000). All SCF states converged. No warnings reported.
